title: shepherd-driver subagent return shapes
description: Two terminal return shapes for the engine. The per-PR drive loop (shepherd-driver-prompt.md) emits a completion_return (kind=completion); it REPLACES the previous shepherd/completion split. The cross-PR conflict-resolution loop (conflict-resolution-prompt.md) emits a conflict_resolution_return (kind=conflict-resolution). The two are disjoint by the const kind field. Schema-validate every return. On malformed, re-spawn ONCE; on second malformed, mark the row blocked and continue.

owner_touch_report.description: Byte-for-byte output of scripts/owner_touch_gate.py detect for the exact base/head pair. The semantic verifier re-derives this report before accepting a terminal return.

functional_test_evidence.description: One executed functional test at the exact head. owner_decisions links the test to canonical owner rows from owner_touch_report.

architecture_evidence_v2.description: Version 2 canonical-owner gate result. Terminal v1 evidence is intentionally rejected: v2 replaces LLM self-classification with a deterministic owner-touch report and executed functional evidence for every touched owner.

classification.description: Interpretive classification after deterministic owner-touch detection. A non-empty touched_owners report forbids ordinary-fix and not-applicable.

dual_guardrail_required.description: True for new-owner and split-authority-repair always, and for owner-extension when the change centralizes or repairs routing.

behavioral_test.description: Behavioral regression test that encodes the symptom (fails before / passes after). Required when dual_guardrail_required=true.

static_guard.description: The scripts/lint-architecture-boundaries.sh check that forbids a second owner. Required when dual_guardrail_required=true.

architecture_test.description: Matching tests/integration/test_architecture_*.py assertion. Required when dual_guardrail_required=true.

mutation_break.description: Evidence that removing the guard makes the behavioral and architecture tests fail. Required when dual_guardrail_required=true.

boundary_lint.description: Result of running bash scripts/lint-architecture-boundaries.sh on the exact head, OR an explicit rationale when the boundary script does not apply.

rationale.description: Why the classification and dual-guardrail disposition are correct after deterministic owner detection.

iterations.description: Outer-loop iteration count consumed by the shepherd-driver run. Cap is 4.

copilot_rounds.description: Number of times the shepherd-driver fetched and classified copilot-pull-request-reviewer[bot] review. Cap is 2.

copilot_findings.description: Per-Copilot-comment classification log. Every Copilot comment seen this run appears here exactly once.

panel_final_verdict.description: CEO stance from the final panel pass in this run.

folded_items.description: Every panel follow-up or Copilot LEGIT item the shepherd-driver folded into THIS PR per the fold-vs-defer rubric.

deferred_items.description: Items NOT folded because they crossed the stated-scope boundary. Each MUST carry a one-line scope_boundary_crossed note.

ci_iterations.description: CI-recovery fix iterations consumed this run. Cap is 3.

ci_evidence.description: CI run URL or `gh pr checks` summary; required when status in {ready-to-merge, advisory-with-deferred}.

lint_evidence.description: Exit code and silent-output confirmation for the canonical ruff pair; required when status=ready-to-merge.

mutation_break_evidence.description: One entry per regression-trap test added: the test name, the guard deleted, and confirmation that the test failed without the guard.

blocker.description: Required when status=blocked. One-paragraph human-readable explanation.

head_sha.description: Full sha of the last commit the shepherd-driver pushed for this PR. Recorded at terminal so the orchestrator can aggregate the mergeability table against the same revision the advisory describes.

mergeable.description: GitHub `mergeable` field from `gh pr view --json mergeable`. Captured at terminal per shepherd-driver step X.8.

merge_state_status.description: GitHub `mergeStateStatus` from `gh pr view --json mergeStateStatus`. Captured at terminal per shepherd-driver step X.8.

ci_status.description: Coarse projection of `statusCheckRollup` at terminal. `green`=all conclusions in {SUCCESS, NEUTRAL, SKIPPED}; `yellow`=any check still pending/in_progress/queued; `red`=any conclusion in {FAILURE, TIMED_OUT, ACTION_REQUIRED, STARTUP_FAILURE}; `blocked`=empty rollup or all cancelled.

panel_execution.description: Which apm-review-panel execution path ran (shepherd-driver-prompt.md Step X.1.1). `skill-tool`=activated via the `skill` tool fast-path; `inline`=panel SKILL.md+schemas executed by this subagent via `task` (the normal subagent-context path). Optional parent-audit field.

panel_personas.description: Persona names fanned out for the panel run (e.g. python-architect, apm-ceo). Optional parent-audit field; lets the orchestrator confirm the inline panel ran the full persona set without reading the child transcript.

routing_receipt.description: B12 parent-audit receipt for THIS shepherd subagent's own model (model-routing.md `Routing receipt` section). Optional observability, not a gate.

requested_model.description: Authoritative SKU the parent passed to `task` for this subagent.

child_echo_model.description: Model the child self-reports; advisory only (a child cannot prove the SKU it ran under).

mergeStateStatus_pre.description: The mergeStateStatus value observed by the conflict-resolution probe BEFORE any rebase. Captured via `gh pr view --json mergeStateStatus`, never asserted from recall.

mergeStateStatus_post.description: The mergeStateStatus value observed by the re-probe AFTER push. Required when status=resolved; must be one of CLEAN / UNSTABLE / HAS_HOOKS (anything else means the rebase did not in fact resolve).

conflicting_paths.description: Paths reported by `git status` during the rebase. An empty array when status=requires-author-action (no rebase attempted) is legal.

rebase_evidence.description: Brief human-readable narrative of the rebase: base SHA, head SHA pre-rebase, head SHA post-rebase, conflicts resolved, fallback used (merge-of-main) if any. Required when status=resolved.

push_command.description: The exact `git push ...` command used. MUST use --force-with-lease (never bare --force). The pattern rejects any --force not immediately followed by -with-lease. Required when status=resolved.

rebase_touched_regression_test.description: True if the rebase introduced changes to a test added during fold-in (regression-trap test). Drives whether mutation_break_evidence is required.

mutation_break_evidence.description: Required when rebase_touched_regression_test=true. Same shape as completion_return.mutation_break_evidence: re-run the gate post-rebase.

lint_evidence.description: Exit code and silent-output confirmation for the canonical ruff pair post-rebase. Required when status=resolved.

comment_url.description: URL of the SECOND-and-final PR comment (resolution-confirmation). Two-comment-per-PR cap honored: the driver PR advisory comment + this resolution comment = 2.

fork_url.description: Required when status=requires-author-action: the contributor fork URL the orchestrator could not push to (maintainer_can_modify=false).

head_branch.description: Required when status=requires-author-action: the contributor branch the author must rebase.

maintainer_can_modify.description: Required when status=requires-author-action: the boolean evidence that pushing was blocked.

author_action_summary.description: Required when status=requires-author-action: a one-paragraph description of exactly what the author must do (rebase onto base SHA, resolve named paths, re-push).

blocker.description: Required when status in {requires-human-judgment, resolution-failed}. One-paragraph human-readable explanation of why the rebase was irrecoverable or what failed.
